name: Pot Roast Mediterranean
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds Eye Round of Beef, tied
recipeInstructions:
1. Make small but deep incisions in the beef with the fat side up.
2. Stuff each cut with olive and 2 slivers of garlic.
3. Place all ingredients (onions, celery, bay leaves, cloves, sugar, savory, pepper, salt, remaining garlic, and half-cup sliced olives) into a large bowl.
4. Pour red wine over everything and marinate in the refrigerator for several hours, turning occasionally.
5. Remove beef and set aside; reserve the marinade.
6. In a Dutch oven, brown meat slowly in oil.
7. Remove meat and place it on a serving platter.
8. Add half of the carrots and potatoes to the pot with the meat, then top with the remaining vegetables.
9. Mix the reserved marinade ingredients (tomatoes) and pour over the top.
10. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours.
11. Remove the cooked meat and place olives and vegetables around it.
12. Strain gravy into a measuring cup.
13. Return the strained gravy to the cooker; bring to boil on high heat.
14. Blend flour with 2 tablespoons water, then quickly stir into boiling gravy.
15. Cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
16. Serve with beef.
